fields.name: Enlistments
fields.definition: !!! DO NOT, UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES, REORDER THIS BLOCK AFTER SHIP !!!

fields.name: name#the string id of the name of this enlistment
description#the string id of the description of this enlistment
sprite index#the sprite index of the icon for this enlistment
grades#the grades that define the leveling track for this enlistment
xp threshold #total earned XP needed to reach this rank
time played multiplier#This is an additional multiplier to rewards given for time played for players at this grade
level up rewards#These rewards will be given to the player when they reach this grade
currency type#Type of currency given by this reward.
reward amount#Amount of the given currency to be given with this reward.

options: disabled#since we can't reorder the list after ship, this allows us to disable/enable this enlistment
